ns0:entry.ns0:title: Barre/ZeroFS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Barre/ZeroFS
Language: rust
ZeroFS - ZeroFS serves S3-compatible buckets as POSIX filesystems over NFS and 9P, or as raw block devices over NBD.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ClementTsang/bottom
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ClementTsang/bottom
Language: rust
Yet another cross-platform graphical process/system monitor.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HelixDB/helix-db
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HelixDB/helix-db
Language: rust
HelixDB is an OLTP graph-vector database built in Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alacritty/alacritty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alacritty/alacritty
Language: rust
A cross-platform, OpenGL terminal emulator.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: astral-sh/ruff
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/astral-sh/ruff
Language: rust
An extremely fast Python linter and code formatter, written in Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bevyengine/bevy
Language: rust
A refreshingly simple data-driven game engine built in Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cocoindex-io/cocoindex
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cocoindex-io/cocoindex
Language: rust
Incremental engine for long horizon agents 🌟 Star if you like it!

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/eclipse-iceoryx/iceoryx2
Language: rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farion1231/cc-switch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch
Language: rust
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Gemini CLI & Hermes Agent. Only official website: ccswitch.io

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gitbutlerapp/gitbutler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gitbutlerapp/gitbutler
Language: rust
The GitButler version control client, backed by Git, powered by Tauri/Rust/Svelte

ns0:entry.ns0:title: graykode/abtop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/graykode/abtop
Language: rust
Like htop, but for AI coding agents. Monitor Claude Code & Codex CLI sessions, tokens, context window, rate limits, and ports in real-time.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iii-hq/iii
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iii-hq/iii
Language: rust
Effortlessly compose, extend, and observe every service in real-time for the first time ever.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: juspay/hyperswitch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/juspay/hyperswitch
Language: rust
Open source, composable payments platform | PCI compliant | SaaS and Self-host options | Enables connectivity to multiple payment, payout, fraud, vault and tokenization providers | Uplifts authorization with intelligent routing and revenue recovery | Reduce payment processing costs with cost observability | Reduces payment ops with reconciliation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: paradigmxyz/reth
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth
Language: rust
Modular, contributor-friendly and blazing-fast implementation of the Ethereum protocol, in Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pgdogdev/pgdog
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pgdogdev/pgdog
Language: rust
PostgreSQL connection pooler, load balancer and database sharder.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pydantic/monty
Language: rust
A minimal, secure Python interpreter written in Rust for use by AI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vectordotdev/vector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vectordotdev/vector
Language: rust

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wezterm/wezterm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wezterm/wezterm
Language: rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: windmill-labs/windmill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/windmill-labs/windmill
Language: rust
Open-source developer platform to power your entire infra and turn scripts into webhooks, workflows and UIs. Fastest workflow engine (13x vs Airflow). Open-source alternative to Retool and Temporal.
